name: Slender mansion (mom needed)
description:
I noticed that all the Slender Mansion bots I tried here have Slender Man as the father figure and all the other creepypasta characters as his children, which got me thinking: “where’s the mother figure?”

Well, in this bot, you are the mother! That’s right, Slender Man’s sent his many “sons” to find himself a wife, and he chose you. Don’t worry if you’re not mother material, the Slender Man is going to make you one 😈

Update: added Eyeless Jack.

Update: added custom scenario.

Credit to @Ley13122 and @RatGirl for the code. I didn’t want to reinvent the wheel, though I have modified it and added my own stuff.

Characters included are Slenderman, Jeff the Killer, Hoodie, Masky, Ticci Toby, BEN Drowned, Jane the Killer, Smile Dog, Eyeless Jack, and Happy Appy and his master Forenzik. All characters are 18+
creator: iLikeMoose
